## Problem

What workflow pain point are you trying to solve?

## Proposed Change

Describe the feature you want.

## Runtime Impact

- Claude only
- Codex only
- Both runtimes

## Files Likely Affected

If you know, list likely touch points:

- `.claude/sgo/agents/...`
- `.claude/sgo/commands/...`
- `.codex/sgo/...`
- `scripts/generate-codex-sgo.py`

## Additional Context

Include examples, mock command flows, or compatibility concerns.
